settings.heading: Everything a nervous dog needs to settle in
settings.intro: The first weeks with a newly-adopted or anxious dog are the hardest — everything is unfamiliar and their nerves are close to the surface. This is our most complete kit: a deep bed to burrow into for a den of their own, plus two gentle, nose-led tools to help them wind down and feel at home.
settings.ticks: 30-day money-back guarantee | Dispatched fast · Free UK delivery over £35
